title: dactylorchis elata
intro: Dactylorchis elata, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dactylorchis elata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
